blocks.content: The Tormia delegation arrived at the royal castle of Jive, across the moat of Delta.

blocks.speaker: Gith
blocks.content: Lower the drawbridge!
The sound of gears turning echoed through the sky as the bridge lowered over the moat.
Lupist, entering the castle, remarked, Well built.
Unlike naturally occurring castles, this one was constructed according to urban planning.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It took twenty years to transform like this. It's proof of political stability.
The main building of Delta came into view.
It was modern in style, a flat rectangular structure when seen from above.

blocks.speaker: Kashan
blocks.content: That's reality.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: To become a leading nation, we need a convincing card to persuade the world. The technology of elemental bombs is excellent, but other countries have similar cards.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: It was a simple issue.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Kashan can control demons, Corona has the intelligence of the Ivory Tower, and then there's Tormia.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Which country would the world want as the leading nation?

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Probably not Tormia.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Yet, the reason they could compete with other countries was because of Yahweh.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Without Shirone, Tormia would just be a mediator with one vote. I also have to consider which country to sell this vote to and for how much.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Even in encounters with superpowers, her heart raced.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: With Shirone's help, it's not impossible. That's why Lupist is putting everything on the line…

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: But Yahweh's stance would be different.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Shirone doesn't need Tormia to become the leading nation. He's here for the unification of humanity.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Of course, as long as Tormia supported Shirone's beliefs, their alliance wouldn't break.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: But would that be enough?

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Politics involves getting your hands dirty. And Lupist won't hesitate to use any means.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: No, she couldn't just pass the responsibility.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: I'm the same.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: For Pony, who had been pushed out of the line of succession early, power was something to overcome.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: There was a time I just wanted to escape.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: It didn't matter if there was no destination.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: I entered the magic school, faced scorn and contempt, even participated in beauty contests…

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Her disillusionment with power allowed her to become a puppet queen.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: In truth…

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Hadn't she desired it more than anyone?

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: No.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Pony shook her head.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: It's just a momentary desire. Focus on helping Shirone. As a mage, for humanity…

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: When she first became queen,

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: The first thing that came to mind was the expressions of the royals who had ignored her.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Now aiming to be the world's queen.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: The thrill of her self-esteem, which she couldn't show anywhere, exploding brilliantly.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: I don't want it to end here.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Something inside her began to whisper.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Bind Shirone to Tormia. If Shirone moves only for me…

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: You can get what you want.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Pony looked at Shirone's profile, deep in thought.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Amy.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: She didn't think she was lacking compared to her.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: If the person next to Shirone was me instead of Amy, would he help? Would he prioritize me over humanity…

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Would he make me the queen of the world?

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Haha.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Power was terrifying.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Yes, that's why I can't do it.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Amy wouldn't have such repulsive thoughts.
At that moment, a sound came from beyond Delta's walls.

blocks.speaker: King of Kessia
blocks.content: Kingdom of Kessia! Enter!
The mere act of Kashan and Corona's officials turning their bodies showed the nation's prestige.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hmm, Kessia. A formidable opponent.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: And at the center is…

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Ardino Fermi.
As the procession led by a golden carriage entered, Lampa of Corona instructed Chongyi.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Don't lose sight of the Kingdom of Kessia. They're the most unpredictable variable in this Holy War.

blocks.speaker: Chongyi
blocks.content: Because their think tank is Golden Wheel. They're the organization that took over seven southern nations with Angel. Their leader is the drug king Fermi.
Ardino Fermi.
The definitions differed between the young and the old.

blocks.speaker: Chongyi
blocks.content: Master, I know you're old, but isn't this too old-fashioned? You said updating information is crucial. Since Yolga's death, the Ardino family has been completely overshadowed by Adria. Fermi is outstanding, but compared to Miro, the epitome of goodness…

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: The depth of Adria.

blocks.speaker: Chongyi
blocks.content: There was a saying, 'The breadth of Ardino.' When the two heroines coexisted. Modern mages see Ardino as a pushover, but have you seen Yolga? Don't update unless you're sure.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: But…

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Yolga's vision, reading the flow of the times, far surpassed human limits. Though her records were erased, it's believed Miro's philosophy was influenced by her.

blocks.speaker: Chongyi
blocks.content: Underestimating Fermi could endanger Corona.
Chongyi smacked his lips.

blocks.speaker: Chongyi
blocks.content: Who's underestimating? I'm serious this time.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Why? Is there someone you fancy?

blocks.speaker: Chongyi
blocks.content: No, well…

blocks.speaker: Chongyi
blocks.content: Information mages were central to all wars but rarely in the spotlight.

blocks.speaker: Chongyi
blocks.content: But the Holy War is different. Here, I can stand out. In other words…

blocks.speaker: Chongyi
blocks.content: He could appeal to women.

blocks.speaker: Chongyi
blocks.content: The world might end, but I should experience love before I die, right?
Lampa knew his student's thoughts as clearly as his palm but didn't scold him.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Maybe that's all there is.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Do humans need grand reasons to live?

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Meanwhile, Uorin felt bitter.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: They finally came.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: The Apocalypse faction had likely set its sights on keeping Shirone in check.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: This won't be easy, will it?

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Between Keshia's wealth, Angel, the drug capable of treating the Emotion Sickness, and the buried information about the Apocalypse, Keshia held cards no one else could play.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: He knows how to exploit every filthy angle.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Though Keshia's tactics were shrouded in shadows, this made them even more dangerous in the bid to become a leading nation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It should work.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Fermi prioritizes extreme efficiency. In other words, he's inclined to resolve problems in the simplest way possible.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: People naturally gravitate toward simplicity.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: At the very least, they have the power to overturn the game once. That's Keshia's greatest weapon.
As Fermi approached Delta's headquarters, all eyes were on him, and he smiled.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Am I really that popular?

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Behind his composed demeanor, he was quickly analyzing the key figures.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Corona seems formidable, with the Stars in their ranks. Kashan is rallying around the Wind Guards… wait.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: He noticed a man leaning against Uorin's back.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Extreme… Havitz.
Their gazes met momentarily before Havitz yawned and looked away.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Haaaah.
...Interesting fellow.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: We need to use him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Those who understood the essence of politics knew they could manipulate Fermi's cards to their advantage.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Tormia, Corona, and Kashan are lined up in order. He'll probably align with a faction he considers friendly.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: This is the weak spot, you fools.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: By bypassing Kashan and Corona, Fermi threw the leadership into confusion.
Rampa stroked his beard thoughtfully.

blocks.speaker: Rampa
blocks.content: Hmm. Not positioning themselves in the middle is a clear show of favor toward Yahweh. It means they prioritize practicality over pride. It makes sense—they're willing to take losses to build trust when necessary.

blocks.speaker: Rampa
blocks.content: But if it was more than a calculated decision…

blocks.speaker: Rampa
blocks.content: If there's something only Ardino can see, then Kashan and Corona may have made a critical mistake.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Hey, Shirone! We keep meeting like this. We might end up becoming best friends.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is a formal setting. Watch your words.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Haha! What's the harm? I'm from Tormia, too. It's been a while, Pony. How have you been? Let's keep it casual since we're on the same side.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Oh, uh… yeah. It's been a while.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Even knowing Fermi's motives were calculated, Pony couldn't ignore the olive branch Keshia was extending.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Clever bastard.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: For now, having Fermi focus on Tormia wasn't a bad thing.
Pony turned to greet Keshia's king, but both she and Shirone were stunned into silence.
The King of Keshia, Manolka, looked like a mummy, his emaciated body covered in wrinkles, mouth agape like a corpse.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He looks... dead.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Fermi, you bastard…

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Oh, right.
He shook the king's shoulder.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Your Majesty, wake up. Stop dozing off.

blocks.speaker: Manolka
blocks.content: Huh? Are we there already? Well, well. Greetings, young ones. I'm Manolka, King of Keshia.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Are you all right? You don't look well.

blocks.speaker: Manolka
blocks.content: People say that a lot. It's just that I'm naturally skinny. Haha!

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Why blame me for everything? This is just how he is. Seventy-two years old and still in his prime!

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: He looks at least 172.
The Grand Hall
The main doors of Delta's headquarters opened to the sound of music.

blocks.speaker: Gith
blocks.content: Welcome, leaders of the world!
A well-built man with a clean-shaven face and a cleft chin entered without an escort.

blocks.speaker: Gith
blocks.content: Although the full ceremony will take place tomorrow, I felt it was inappropriate to keep you waiting. So, I've prepared a special prelude.

blocks.speaker: Gith
blocks.content: A prelude?
As confusion spread, a towering woman emerged from the hall.

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: ...What?

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: Allow me to introduce Jive's new strength that will guide our future—the Heavenly Army.
The rooftop of the headquarters sparkled, and hundreds of radiant beams ascended into the sky. Each beam was an angel, their divine halos radiating unique, awe-inspiring power.

blocks.speaker: Gith
blocks.content: Damn.
The overwhelming force shook the ground, leaving the officials pale with fear.

blocks.speaker: Gith
blocks.content: Welcome to Jive.
